title.rendered: Aligning CMO Strategies with CEO Expectations

content.rendered: Join David Reske, CEO of Nowspeed, and guest Jason Mundy, Fractional CMO, in this enlightening episode as they discuss essential strategies for Chief Marketing Officers to align their initiatives with the evolving expectations of Chief Executive Officers. Learn how CMOs can adapt to organizational dynamics, respond to economic shifts, and employ strategic planning and risk management. They’ll also delve into building strong financial relationships and continuously learning from experience to ensure marketing efforts resonate with executive goals and significantly contribute to organizational success. Tune in to gain actionable insights on enhancing strategic alignment, fostering resilience, and driving impactful growth within your company.
